decision_summary: Proceed to a bounded C104 gate that extends the C092 Qwen-target SigLIP distillation idea onto the larger C097/C087 hard-shape data, with explicit negatives and a stricter pre-generation decision. Do not train on C100-C102 local-real candidates until manual or external annotation yields at least 8 confirmed local positives.

base_checkpoint_or_encoder.model_family: SigLIP2 native ComfyUI patch path with Qwen hard-shape teacher targets

train_or_probe_command_surface.first_step: Build a C104 manifest that materializes C097 refs/targets/negatives and attaches Qwen teacher target evidence from the C087 hard-shape baseline where available.
train_or_probe_command_surface.probe_before_training: Score whether Qwen teacher target images create separable SigLIP feature margins over C097 positives versus explicit negatives; block if margin is not better than C098's finished LoRA signal.
train_or_probe_command_surface.training_if_probe_passes: Run bounded SigLIP adapter/encoder adaptation only after the C104 manifest/probe passes: no heldout rows, explicit negatives preserved, compare against C092/C094/C096/C098 and Qwen baseline.

eval_gate.pre_generation_gate: C104 manifest/probe must prove rows>=48, explicit_negative_rows==rows, heldout_rows_used==0, missing_path_count==0, and selected feature margin is stronger than the C098 post-training margin.
eval_gate.generation_gate_if_training_runs: Reuse the C098 hard-shape contact-sheet gate with variants no_ip, c087_qwen_baseline, c092_qwen_target_w14, c094_shape_supervised_w14, c096_lora_c094_w14, c098_lora_c094_w14, and the C104 candidate.
visual_focus: avoid green adult humanoid face/bust collapse

stop_conditions: Any heldout row appears in the C104 training manifest.
The C104 probe shows no stronger separable SigLIP signal than C098.
Training loss is non-finite or checkpoint loadability fails.
Generation produces blank-like C104 outputs or keeps the same green humanoid collapse on contact-sheet review.
no_heldout_leakage_policy: C104 may use C097 train rows and C087/C098 train crop-pair references only. Heldout07 and clean32 heldout8 remain evaluation-only.

rejected_branches.evidence: C074 has 10 target positives but license/NFA caveat and narrow character-domain risk make it a supporting teacher/source, not the only primary branch.

next_goal_recommendation.title: C104 expanded Qwen-target SigLIP hard-shape distillation probe
next_goal_recommendation.objective: Build and run the C104 manifest/probe over C097/C087 hard-shape data before any long training; if probe passes, run bounded training and a C098-style generation gate, then document, commit, push, and continue.
